chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Appl. No.264 of 2017 The Commissioner Inland Revenue, Zone III Versus M/s Century Insurance Co. Ltd. Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case Dated: 06.12.2021 Mr. Muhammad Din Qazi holds brief for Mr. M. Aqeel Qureshi for applicant. -.-.- This is fourth date of hearing when counsel for applicant is avoiding to proceed with the matter. The matter was earlier fixed on 21.08.2017 when time was granted. Time was again granted on 02.10.2018 followed by last hearing on 26.10.2021 when it was observed that in case no one appears on behalf of the applicant to proceed with the matter, it shall be dismissed for non-prosecution. However, today again a request for adjournment is made on behalf of applicant’s counsel. It appears that the applicant has lost interest in the proceedings. Instant Income Tax Reference Application is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
